description_long: This object consists of three enamel cups, each with a cylindrical body, a rounded handle, and a slightly flared rim. The cups are colored distinctly: one is turquoise blue, one is mustard yellow, and one is deep red, each with a white interior and a black rim accent. The exterior of each cup features visible printed text or branding, adding a decorative and commercial touch. The handles are robust and smoothly integrated into the cup bodies, allowing for easy gripping. The enamel finish gives the cups a glossy, hard surface that is both durable and easy to clean. These cups are typical of those used for coffee or tea and are often found in urban settings such as cafes, food trucks, or outdoor events.
description: A set of three glossy enamel cups in blue, yellow, and red, each with a black rim, white interior, and visible branding or text on the exterior.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three cups side by side, with their handles and decorative text clearly visible.
description_view_1: Rear view showing the backs of the cups, with no text or branding visible and the handles aligned to the right.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the plain colored backs and handles of the cups, with no visible text.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the cups from behind, with the colored bodies and white interiors visible, no text or handles in view.
